specs.prompt: Build a runnable CSS animation library playground. Do not ask follow-up questions. The preview must visibly include a search bar that filters by animation name, category tabs for Entrances, Exits, and Attention Seekers, a live preview stage where each selected animation plays on a target element, a copy class name button, timing duration and iteration count controls, a reduced-motion toggle, and a delay slider.

followUps.label: add-custom-keyframe
followUps.prompt: Add a custom keyframe editor tab where the user can write raw @keyframes CSS and preview it live on the stage element.

specs.prompt: Build a runnable scroll reveal animation showcase. Do not ask follow-up questions. The page must include at least five pinned scroll sections where elements fade or slide in as the user scrolls, a scroll progress bar at the top, parallax depth layers behind the content, staggered child item entrances, an easing selector, an offset and threshold control panel, and a performance note crediting IntersectionObserver over scroll event listeners.

followUps.label: add-reset-scroll
followUps.prompt: Add a reset button that jumps the page back to the top and replays all reveal animations.

specs.prompt: Build a runnable text animation effects playground. Do not ask follow-up questions. It must include a live text input, at least six animation presets — typewriter, gradient color shift, split-letter bounce, glitch scramble, wave ripple, and neon pulse — a live preview stage, speed and color controls, a copy CSS keyframes button, and a reduced-motion graceful fallback panel.

followUps.label: add-stagger-mode
followUps.prompt: Add a stagger mode that applies the selected animation to each letter individually with a configurable delay between letters.

specs.prompt: Build a runnable 3D CSS card interaction kit. Do not ask follow-up questions. The preview must include perspective hover effects that tilt cards based on mouse position, a dynamic depth shadow system, front-and-back face card flip, a stacked deck expand on click, a controls panel with perspective distance and tilt sensitivity sliders, and a copy snippet button that exports the CSS for the selected card style.

followUps.label: add-foil-gradient
followUps.prompt: Add a holographic foil gradient layer that shifts hue based on mouse position when hovering a card.

specs.prompt: Build a runnable creative cursor effects showcase. Do not ask follow-up questions. It must include at least five distinct cursor modes — magnetic snap to nearest button, particle trail, radial spotlight, morphing shape, and spring physics lag — a mode switcher panel, a canvas or pointer-events overlay that follows the real cursor, a lag and spring tension control, and a copy snippet action for the selected cursor style.

Build a runnable skeleton loading animation design system. Do not ask follow-up questions. It must include three animation variants — shimmer, pulse, and wave — skeleton placeholder layouts for a card, a list row, a table, and a profile header, speed and delay controls, a toggle that reveals the real content underneath, a dark mode switch, and accessibility notes covering aria-busy, role, and reduced motion preferences.

followUps.label: add-data-table-skeleton
followUps.prompt: Add a data table skeleton variant with configurable row count and column widths, matching the existing shimmer animation.
